scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.build:main: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/main/desktop/electron',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('electron/preload.cjs','dist/main/desktop/electron/preload.cjs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/main/desktop/build',{recursive:true}); if(fs.existsSync('build/tray-icon.png')){ fs.copyFileSync('build/tray-icon.png','dist/main/desktop/electron/tray-icon.png'); fs.copyFileSync('build/tray-icon.png','dist/main/desktop/build/tray-icon.png'); } if(fs.existsSync('build/icon.png')){ fs.copyFileSync('build/icon.png','dist/main/desktop/build/icon.png'); }"
scripts.pack:dir: npm run build:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.json -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
scripts.pack:release: npm run build:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
